title: Income Tax Act, 2025 Transition: Crucial Clarifications Released!
content:
# Income Tax Act, 2025 Transition: Crucial Clarifications Released!

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department ne Income Tax Act, 2025 mein transition kaise hoga, uspar crucial clarifications announce kiye hain. Yeh guidelines 3 June 2026 ko publish kiye gaye hain taaki taxpayers ko old aur new acts ke concurrent operation mein clarity mil sake.

Here are the key points from the clarifications:

*   **Repeal and Applicability:** The Income Tax Act, 1961, has been repealed, but its provisions will continue to govern tax years beginning before April 1, 2026.
*   **E-filing Portal:** Income Tax Department ka e-filing portal old aur new dono Acts ke under compliance facilitate karega.
*   **Assessment Year 2026-27:** Taxpayers jo Assessment Year 2026-27 (jo old Act se govern hota hai) ke returns July 2026 mein file karenge, unhe old Act ke prescribed forms hi use karne honge.
*   **Advance Tax for Tax Year 2026-27:** Tax Year 2026-27 ke liye advance tax payments, jo June 2026 se shuru ho rahe hain, new Act ke according honge.
*   **Pending Proceedings:** Earlier years se related sabhi assessments, appeals, aur other proceedings old Act ke under hi continue rahenge jab tak unka final resolution nahi ho jaata.
*   **Validity of Old Orders:** Tax department dwara issue kiye gaye old circulars, instructions, aur notifications tab tak valid rahenge jab tak woh new Act se conflict nahi karte, as per Section 536(2)(j) of the Income Tax Act, 2025.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/help/income-tax-act-2025/faqs-on-interplay-and-transition-from-the-income-tax-act-1961-to-the-income-tax-act-2025)

*Published on: 3 June 2026*
